notes: Script uses old Adams deck/block format (PART/id, MARKER/id, SPLINE/id, GFORCE/id) throughout instead of the Adams/View command language. As a result: (1) spline is declared as SPLINE/1 block instead of data_element create spline; (7) no dot-path names used — objects referenced by numeric IDs; (8) numeric IDs (/1, /2, /3 etc.) are used everywhere, violating the no-adams_id rule; (9) mass/inertia set inline in PART/2 and PART/3 declarations rather than via part modify rigid_body mass_properties; (10) CM=20 is specified in the PART block, equivalent to passing center_of_mass_marker; (11) no geometry shapes added to the subframe or chassis; (12) not validated. The physics and force expressions are correct — AKISPL for nonlinear X, linear 5000 N/mm for Y/Z, -200*RTOD*AX/AY/AZ for the rotational DOFs with correct unit conversion, and the spline data matches the specification exactly.
